title: marsilea major
intro: Marsilea major, also known as the great waterclover or four-leaf clover, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the Marsileaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory infections. The health benefits of Marsilea major include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. In herbal preparations, Marsilea major is often used as a decoction or infusion, and can also be found in combination with other herbs in various traditional remedies.
